evidence: TASK-028 (R2 action-steps-are-learning-designed; shared-preamble success-criteria item 6) via the canonical pipeline. IMPL 2181067: added item 6 (each action step opens by recalling prior learning, sets a task participants actively DO, surfaces a check of understanding, closes with reflection/next-step; embodied in plain prose, no OPEN/CORE/EVIDENCE/CLOSE labels, no methodology aside; with a designed-vs-transmission exemplar) + mirrored FRAG-preamble + re-stamped content_hash + parity 14/14. A SEPARATE adversarial audit built a per-step four-element matrix and confirmed all 6 steps show all four elements (recall / active task / check / reflection), zero transmission-only steps, zero scaffolding labels, and the steps parse clean against parse_decompose_action_steps (the only flags = 2 benign pre-existing soft-NER false-positives on the generic phrase 'Head of Department'; the specific HoD titles are all enumerated; not fabrications, not introduced by this rule). criteria_results.criterion: In a freshly generated plan, every action step shows four observable elements -- a reference to prior learning/context, a task participants actively do, a check of understanding, and a closing next-step/reflection -- an adversarial reviewer marks all four per step with zero steps failing.
The scan for step-scaffolding labels yields zero occurrences.
Zero action steps are attend/listen/read-only (transmission) -- an adversarial reviewer confirms none.
The dispatched output parses clean with no new fabrication flags.
